description: Send notifications to your own Prowl destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise prowl:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
name: msg-to-prowl

request.template: {"urls":"prowl://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

apikey=${ customer_secrets.PROWL_APIKEY }&application={* _escape_json(_body.title or "UnitySVC") *}&description={* _escape_json(_body.body or _body.title or "") *}&event={* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *}&priority=0

apikey=${ customer_secrets.PROWL_APIKEY }&application={* _escape_json(_body.title or "UnitySVC") *}&description={* _escape_json(_body.body or _body.title or "") *}&event={* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *}&priority=0
